isFastFoodModelNote: Limited-service / order-ahead app model (order & pay before pickup, primarily takeout); confirm with legal before relying for Fair Workweek.

national._note: locationCount = open/operating retail establishments. See breakdown for planned/closed and all-status totals; choose the count appropriate to each rule.
national._employeeCountNote: Not in the ops extract. Set this (or use the /applicability employee what-if slider) to evaluate employee-gated rules (FMLA 50+, Title VII 15+, ESSTA tiers). 30 retail stores almost certainly ⇒ 100+ US employees, but the exact headcount is unverified, so it is left null (待补充) rather than guessed.

jurisdictions._floorAreaCoverage: sqft known for 20/20 open NYC stores (full coverage)

floorArea._unit: sqft (converted from ops m² x10.7639; rounded to whole sqft)
floorArea._basis: 20 open retail stores with known area

coverageNote: Refreshed 2026-07-14 from live luckyus_opshop (status=1 & internal=0, test stores excluded): 20 open, 5 planned, 5 closed/withdrawn — all New York City. Floor area known for all 20/20 open stores (converted from t_shop_resource.square_size m² x10.7639). Planned/closed rows carried from the prior 2026-06-20 snapshot. 2 stores opened since that snapshot (Grand Central Terminal, 48th & 3rd). dohEstablishmentId preserved from prior CAMIS match where available; new stores null (enrich re-matches). Internal test/commissary depts (internal=1) excluded. Roster UNREVIEWED (reviewed=false) — verify vs leases/COs before compliance determinations.
